No prose or payload body follows the frontmatter

Record is purely metadata with no content body

Uses a prefixed UUID for the attachment id
Uses ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone
References external entities with a URI-style target
concerns: No human-readable title or description is present
The meaning or payload of the board_items attachment is not defined within the file
The target board item is referenced but not described here
